description_long: This object is a stylized potted plant with broad, overlapping leaves radiating outward from a central point. The leaves are thick, smooth, and have a simple, low-polygon appearance, each with a slightly angular edge and a uniform light green color. There is no visible pot or container, and the plant appears to be a single, cohesive structure without any visible soil or stem. The overall form is compact and symmetrical, with the leaves arching gently downward. The surface of the leaves is matte and lacks any visible texture or decorative elements. This type of plant would be suitable for decorative use in urban parks, sidewalks, or as part of landscape features in public spaces.
description: A stylized, broad-leafed potted plant with smooth, angular green leaves radiating from a central point and no visible pot.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the symmetrical arrangement of five broad, overlapping green leaves.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the arch and thickness of the leaves, with some leaves partially obscured.
description_view_2: Low side view emphasizing the downward curve and flatness of the leaves, with minimal visibility of the plant's center.
description_view_3: Side view showing the spread and angular edges of the leaves, with the central point slightly visible.
